questions.prompt: Answer three questions about yourself. You have 30 seconds for each answer.

questions: Please tell me about your family.
What do you usually do at the weekend?
Tell me about the town or city where you live.

questions.prompt: Describe the picture, then answer two questions. You have 45 seconds for each answer.

questions: Tell me about the last time you went to the cinema.
Do you prefer watching films at the cinema or at home? Why?

questions.prompt: Compare the two pictures, then answer two questions. You have 45 seconds for each answer.

questions: Describe and compare the two pictures.
Which of these ways of travelling would you prefer for a long journey? Why?
Why do you think people choose different ways of travelling?

questions.prompt: You will talk about one topic for two minutes. You have one minute to prepare your ideas.

questions: Tell me about a skill you have learned using the internet or a mobile app.
How did learning in this way make you feel?
Why do you think some people prefer learning online while others prefer a classroom?
